title: Straw Hat Crew Golden Hour Deck
sourceTitle: Straw Hat Crew Golden Hour Deck

imagePrompts.prompt: the Straw Hat crew gathered on the deck of the Thousand Sunny at golden hour, each character mid-laugh, in motion, or relaxing. Luffy leans over the rail with a grin, Nami charts something on the table, and Chopper clutches a cotton candy stick. The ship's polished wood glows under warm sunlight, and distant seabirds fly across a coral-tinted horizon.
